metadata.title:
SHOULD THE WOMEN WANT TO VOTE?

(NEGATIVE)
BY Mrs. Julian Heath.

pages.raw_text:
The ballot does not aid women
when they use it themselves. They
have never used it to benefit
themselves, and they never will
nor can.


Women have had the right to
vote in Utah, yet they have never
voted out polygamy. Why did not
the women of Utah vote out Sem
ator Reed SmOot, a Mormon? All
the women of the country cried
out against him. but the women
voters of Utah did not act.


In Idaho, Wyoming and Colo
RADIO, the other three suffrage
states, women have not bettered
themselves socially or economic
ally. The best laws for women and
children are not in these states,
In Idaho the laws do not regu-
late the labor of women, though
20 states have such laws, which
recognize difference between the
strength of men and women, in
